turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, hi. I'm looking to get a second opinion on a diagnosis. Can I see a senior doctor?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. Could you share what kind of specialist you're looking for? We have senior consultants across most departments.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oncology. I was diagnosed with something and I just, uh, want another perspective.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I completely understand. Dr. Avinash Deshpande is our senior oncologist and is highly experienced. He has availability next Tuesday at 11 AM. Would you like to book?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes please. I'm Pooja Shah. Contact number is 9988776655.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I've booked your appointment, Ms. Shah. Dr. Avinash Deshpande, next Tuesday at 11 AM. Please bring all your existing reports and biopsy results if any. We'll make sure you get the time and attention you need.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thank you so much. I really appreciate it.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We're here for you. Please take care of yourself.
